name: code-distilling
description: Port high-quality implementations from reference open-source repos into your project with discipline: analysis, design, planning, and equivalence-tested execution.

interface.shortDescription: Disciplined porting of features from reference open-source repos into your project.
interface.longDescription: Use Code Distilling to analyze a reference repo, decide per-chunk distillation mode (copy / port / learn-then-rewrite), produce a distillation spec and plan, and execute the port with equivalence tests derived from the reference.
defaultPrompt: I want to port a feature from /path/to/reference-repo into my project.
Help me distill the OAuth implementation from this reference.
